since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.42%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.33% · BTC -1.79% · Gold -2.12% · Nasdaq100 -1.08%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.42%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.42%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, INTU +5.22%, CRM +4.60%, WDAY +4.30%, TTD +4.25%. Laggards: APP -9.58%, ARM -6.53%, MRVL -5.71%, SYNA -4.72%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.24% at $139.14
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.24% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
